name: /audit-pack: bundles the control coverage section sourced from compliance/controls.yaml (C-2 / §2.9)
command:
mkdir -p compliance && printf -- "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: reviewed_by:legal:2026-04-01
- framework: eu-ai-act
  control_id: Article-14
  satisfied_by: [hook]
  legal_review_status: reviewed_by:legal:2026-04-01
" > compliance/controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/audit-pack.sh" --controls-file "$PWD/compliance/controls.yaml" --emit "$PWD/audit-pack.md" --section control-coverage && grep "CC8.1" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && grep "Article-14" audit-pack.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
